title: skill-reflect configuration
description: Configuration for the skill-reflect universal skill-feedback reviewer. All fields optional; the skill works with no config file using these defaults.

mode.description: standalone = installed by an end user to review any distributed skill; vendored = copied into a plugin, pre-scoped to that plugin's skills with a hardcoded destination.

skills.description: Allowlist of skill names or globs to reflect on. Empty = all DISTRIBUTED skills.

mode.description: local = only write a Markdown artifact; issue = offer to file a GitHub issue after second consent; ask = decide per run.

repo.description: owner/repo used for vendored/hardcoded routing when provenance can't be auto-resolved.

registryMapPath.description: Path to a JSON map of skill-name -> owner/repo. Overrides $SKILL_REFLECT_HOME/registry.json.

extraScrubPatterns.description: Additional regexes to redact on top of the built-in deterministic scrub list (scrub.py --pattern; category 'custom').

redactTerms.description: Literal confidential terms to redact deterministically as 'domain-term' (scrub.py --term): product/app/brand names, internal project names, or codewords that would reveal the domain or the specific app where friction occurred. Case-insensitive, matched on token boundaries. A backstop under the model's semantic domain-abstraction; it does not replace it.

redactionPreview.description: Always true. The exact artifact is shown for review before anything is written or sent.

allowTranscriptExcerpts.description: Always false. Verbatim transcript excerpts are never included; content is paraphrased.
